## Simple Blockquote

> This is a blockquote.
> It can span multiple lines.

## Blockquote with Other Elements

> ### Heading in a blockquote
>
> - List item in a blockquote
> - Another item
>
> ```python
> code_in_blockquote = True
> ```
>
> **Bold in a blockquote** and *italic too*.
